Mnemonic.doc: represents a BIP-39 mnemonic phrase used for key derivation.

new.doc: parses a mnemonic from a space-separated word string.

from_entropy.doc: creates a mnemonic from raw entropy bytes.

generate.doc: generates a random mnemonic (12 words if false, 24 words if true).

verify.doc: checks whether a mnemonic string is valid.

to_string.doc: returns the mnemonic as a space-separated word string.

to_entropy.doc: returns the raw entropy bytes underlying the mnemonic.

to_seed.doc: derives a seed from the mnemonic using the given password.
